message:
feat(telegram): add error taxonomy, retry_after, to_fcp_error, and ConnectorErrorMapping

Add retry_after() and to_fcp_error() inherent methods to TelegramError,
mapping HTTP 429 to RateLimited, 401 to Unauthorized, 403 to CapabilityDenied,
InvalidChatId to InvalidRequest, and everything else to External. Implement
ConnectorErrorMapping on top of those methods. Includes comprehensive tests
for all FCP error mappings, retry logic, and trait integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
